title: ExtraDE Neat Compat
description: Simple addon that adds ExtraDE icons to Neat.
body:
# ExtraDE Neat Compatibility (deprecated)

### **Extra Damage Enchantments now has this functionality built-in. This mod is no longer required.**

[![Image](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/Provismet/ExtraDE-Neat-Compat/blob/1.0.0/LICENSE)
![Image](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-1976d2?style=flat-square)
![Image](https://img.shields.io/badge/mod%20loader-fabric/quilt-d64541?style=flat-square)

This is a simple addon that adds additional entity group icons to [Neat](https://modrinth.com/mod/neat) for use with Extra Damage Enchantments.

Check the gallery to see the icons in practice.

### Icons are as follows:
- Aquatic
  - Cod
- Arcane
  - Lapis Lazuli
- Beastly
  - Raw Beef
- Humanoid
  - Book
- Illager
  - Iron Axe
- Fungifloral
  - Kelp
- Outerworldly
  - Enderpearl
